verdictClassificationReason: A HARD_FAIL, FAIL, or IN_SCOPE_GAP remains and prevents final acceptance.
nonPurePassExplanation: Pure PASS is not allowed because: Requirement verifier is MISSING; Story verifier is MISSING; Contract verifier is MISSING; E2E verifier is MISSING; UI verifier is MISSING; Pixel-perfect visual diff is NOT_CLAIMED; required verifier result missing: requirement-coverage.json; required verifier result missing: requirement-section-map.json; required verifier result missing: requirement-verifier.json; required verifier result missing: story-curation.json; required verifier result missing: story-test-materialize.json; required verifier result missing: generated-story-tests.json; required verifier result missing: story-quality-gate.json; required verifier result missing: story-verifier.json
nextRecommendedAction: Read final-convergence-report.md, gap-list.json, and next-agent-action.md; repair failed hard gates before final acceptance.
